_nt_bridge_doc: M13-07: optional NATS bridge to the Python MD service (research/quantfoundry-md-bridge/). enabled=false keeps boot wiring identical to pre-M13. Modes per docs/tdd/broker-integration.md §6: 'observe' appends the nt-bridge adapter at lowest priority (legacy still owns prod), 'first' prepends (NT canonical, legacy fallback), 'only' replaces legacy. Brokers must include 'schwab' and/or 'ibkr'. Operator changes mode by editing this block + restarting the server (hot-reload not supported in v1).
